NVDA.decision_summary: Buy 67 shares of NVDA at $209.25, targeting $222.50 within 5-10 trading days with a stop-loss at $205.30 and a 3.35:1 risk/reward ratio.
NVDA.why_this_setup: Four out of five swing agents turned bullish on NVDA, supported by a strong trend signal (ADX of 54.67) and a pullback to the 38.2% Fibonacci retracement level near $209.70, which also coincides with solid volume support at $208.20. The broader catalyst of hyperscaler AI capital expenditure announcements remains active, providing a fundamental tailwind for the trade.
NVDA.key_risks: RSI readings are elevated (74.76 on the daily, 81.52 on a shorter timeframe), flagging overbought conditions that could stall or reverse the move. Additionally, declining On-Balance Volume (OBV) on the hourly chart signals weakening buying pressure, which is why a tight stop below the 61.8% Fibonacci level at $205.30 is essential.
NVDA.what_to_watch: Monitor the $216.83 resistance level — a clean break there opens the door to a $231 extension target, while failure at that level may warrant trimming the position. Key catalysts to track include any new hyperscaler AI infrastructure spending announcements, which could accelerate the move toward the $222.50 initial target.
